official_functions.role: Construct the official Play clientbound update_mob_effect fixture
Encode/decode the bounded MobEffect holder through official registry-holder policy

official_functions.function_or_member: MobEffectInstance constructor and ClientboundUpdateMobEffectPacket flag derivation
official_functions.role: Provide the amplifier, duration, ambient, visible, icon, and blend flag bytes

invariants: The official Play clientbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the update_mob_effect body.
The official fixture preserves entity id, MobEffect holder, amplifier, duration, and flags through stream decode and framed dispatch decode.
This contract does not prove entity existence, effect application, HUD/particle behavior, or arbitrary MobEffect registry ids.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this packet-support contract to infer entity/effect runtime state or arbitrary MobEffect holder behavior.
